summary: Tested Subscription Analytics Dashboard feature. Backend: 11/11 tests PASSED. Frontend: All Analytics tab features verified - 6 KPI cards, 4 charts (Signups line chart, Trial Funnel donut chart, Tier Distribution bar chart, Revenue by Tier bar chart), Refresh Analytics button working.

issues: Console warnings about recharts chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - cosmetic issue, charts render correctly

passed_tests: GET /api/admin/subscription-stats requires authentication (401/403)
GET /api/admin/subscription-stats requires admin role (403 for non-admin)
Analytics endpoint returns mrr (Monthly Recurring Revenue)
Analytics endpoint returns arr (Annual Recurring Revenue = 12x MRR)
Analytics endpoint returns trial_conversion_pct (0-100)
Analytics endpoint returns churn_rate_pct (0-100)
Analytics endpoint returns tier_distribution array with tier, id, count, price
Analytics endpoint returns signup_trend (30 days of data)
Analytics endpoint returns trial_breakdown (active, expired_no_sub, converted, churned)
Analytics endpoint returns revenue_by_tier array with tier, id, revenue, subscribers
Analytics endpoint returns all 16 expected fields
Analytics tab visible in admin panel tabs (data-testid='admin-tab-analytics')
subscription-analytics container present (data-testid='subscription-analytics')
KPI card: MRR present (data-testid='kpi-mrr')
KPI card: Trial Conversion present (data-testid='kpi-trial-conversion')
KPI card: Churn Rate present (data-testid='kpi-churn-rate')
KPI card: Active Trials present (data-testid='kpi-active-trials')
KPI card: Active Subs present (data-testid='kpi-active-subs')
KPI card: Pending Reviews present (data-testid='kpi-pending-reviews')
Signups — Last 30 Days line chart renders with data
Trial Funnel donut chart renders showing Active Trial % and Expired (No Sub) %
Tier Distribution bar chart renders with tier names on X-axis
Monthly Revenue by Tier bar chart renders
Refresh Analytics button works (data-testid='refresh-analytics')
critical_code_review_comments: SubscriptionAnalytics component correctly fetches data from /api/admin/subscription-stats
KPI cards use correct data-testid format: kpi-{label-lowercase-hyphenated}
recharts ResponsiveContainer has width='100%' height={220} - may need min-width/min-height for edge cases
Data correctly mapped: mrr, arr, trial_conversion_pct, churn_rate_pct from API to UI
Charts use CHART_COLORS array for consistent styling
CustomTooltip component provides good hover UX
context_for_next_testing_agent: Analytics dashboard at /admin/analytics fully functional. Current data shows: 20 total users, 19 active trials, 0 active subscriptions (beta mode ON), 1 pending verification, $0 MRR (expected since beta mode is ON). Trial funnel shows 95% active trial, 5% expired without subscription. Signups chart shows ~20 signups around 02/22-02/24. All data-testid attributes properly implemented for all KPI cards and the main container.
minor_console_warnings: recharts shows 'width(-1) height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' warnings - this is a known recharts issue when containers are not fully rendered. Charts still display correctly.
